ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Whole grain brown rice 74%, olive oil 18%, flavouring blend 8% [natural flavourings, wheat maltodextrin, whey powder, salt, sugar, tomato 6%, cheese powder 6%, onion 6%, oregano 3%, parsley 2.5%, glucose syrup, potato maltodextrin, colour: paprika extract, acidity regulator: sodium phosphate, citric acid].
product_name: Rice Up Popped Brown Rice Rolls Pizza & Olive Oil 50g
